_meta.description: SIT ingredient brain — plain-language ingredient education.

hyaluronic_acid.name: Hyaluronic Acid
hyaluronic_acid.benefit: Draws moisture into the skin from the environment and deeper layers
hyaluronic_acid.usage_notes: Apply to slightly damp skin for best effect. Use morning and evening.
hyaluronic_acid.layering_notes: Pairs well with ceramides, peptides, niacinamide. Use before thicker textures.
hyaluronic_acid.sensitivity_notes: Very well tolerated. Suitable for sensitive skin.

niacinamide.name: Niacinamide (Vitamin B3)
niacinamide.benefit: Supports barrier function, helps balance oil, supports an even-looking complexion
niacinamide.usage_notes: Suitable morning and evening. Stable ingredient.
niacinamide.layering_notes: Works well with most ingredients. Avoid pairing with high-dose Vitamin C in the same step.
niacinamide.sensitivity_notes: Very well tolerated. Can cause temporary flush in rare cases at high concentrations.

retinol.name: Retinol (Vitamin A)
retinol.benefit: Supports cell turnover, fine line appearance, and skin firmness over time
retinol.usage_notes: Evening use only. Introduce slowly. Always follow with SPF next morning.
retinol.layering_notes: Do not combine with AHAs, BHAs, or Vitamin C in the same evening step.
retinol.sensitivity_notes: Can cause purging, redness, or peeling during introduction. Start 2x weekly.
retinol.caution: Avoid during pregnancy and breastfeeding. Consult a professional if on prescription Tretinoin.

lactic_acid.name: Lactic Acid (AHA)
lactic_acid.benefit: Gently exfoliates the skin surface to support smoother-looking texture
lactic_acid.usage_notes: Evening use preferred. Start 2–3 times per week. Use SPF next morning.
lactic_acid.layering_notes: Do not layer with other exfoliating actives (BHA, retinol) on the same evening.
lactic_acid.sensitivity_notes: Gentler than Glycolic Acid. Suitable for most skin types when introduced correctly.
lactic_acid.caution: Avoid on actively irritated, raw, or sunburned skin.

salicylic_acid.name: Salicylic Acid (BHA)
salicylic_acid.benefit: Oil-soluble exfoliant that supports clearer-looking pores
salicylic_acid.usage_notes: Evening use preferred. Start every other night and build up.
salicylic_acid.layering_notes: Do not combine with AHAs or retinol on the same evening.
salicylic_acid.sensitivity_notes: Can be drying. Use a lightweight moisturiser or the Support Spray alongside.
salicylic_acid.caution: High concentrations (above 2%) should be used with caution. Avoid in pregnancy.

ceramides.name: Ceramides
ceramides.benefit: Reinforce the skin's protective barrier to retain moisture and reduce sensitivity
ceramides.usage_notes: Morning and evening. Works best when combined with cholesterol and fatty acids.
ceramides.layering_notes: Pairs with all ingredients. Use before occlusive creams.
ceramides.sensitivity_notes: Extremely well tolerated. Often first recommendation for compromised skin.

vitamin_c.name: Vitamin C (Ascorbyl Glucoside)
vitamin_c.benefit: Antioxidant that supports brighter-looking skin and even tone appearance
vitamin_c.usage_notes: Suitable morning or evening. Stable form (Ascorbyl Glucoside) is gentler than L-Ascorbic Acid.
vitamin_c.layering_notes: Avoid combining with Niacinamide at the same time (minor interaction risk — use at different times of day).
vitamin_c.sensitivity_notes: Can cause mild tingling at first. Reduce frequency if persistent.

centella_asiatica.name: Centella Asiatica (Cica)
centella_asiatica.benefit: Soothing botanical that supports calmer, more comfortable-looking skin
centella_asiatica.usage_notes: Morning and evening. Pairs well with barrier ingredients.
centella_asiatica.layering_notes: Works with all ingredients. Often combined with ceramides for barrier repair.
centella_asiatica.sensitivity_notes: Very gentle. One of the best-tolerated cosmetic actives.

retinaldehyde.name: Retinaldehyde (Retinal)
retinaldehyde.benefit: An advanced retinoid that supports renewal, the look of fine lines, smoother texture, and refined pores
retinaldehyde.usage_notes: Evening use only. In our range it is encapsulated for gentleness in the Retinal Bio-Lift Night Serum. Introduce slowly and use SPF the next morning.
retinaldehyde.layering_notes: Do not combine with AHAs, BHAs, or Vitamin C in the same evening step.
retinaldehyde.sensitivity_notes: Generally better tolerated than older retinoids, but can still cause dryness during introduction. Start 2x weekly.
retinaldehyde.caution: Avoid during pregnancy and breastfeeding. Consult a professional if on prescription retinoids.

bakuchiol.name: Bakuchiol
bakuchiol.benefit: A gentle botanical that offers retinoid-like support for firmness and fine lines without typical retinoid irritation
bakuchiol.usage_notes: Suitable morning or evening. In our range it pairs with Retinaldehyde in the Retinal Bio-Lift Night Serum to soften its introduction.
bakuchiol.layering_notes: Layers well with most ingredients including peptides and HA.
bakuchiol.sensitivity_notes: Very well tolerated, including by many who cannot use retinoids.

peptides.name: Peptides (Signal Peptides)
peptides.benefit: Support a firmer, smoother, more conditioned-looking complexion over time
peptides.usage_notes: Morning and evening. Feature in our Caviar Lift, Peptide Repair Barrier, and Neuro Peptide Eye & Smile Line serums.
peptides.layering_notes: Gentle and layer-friendly. Pair comfortably with HA, ceramides, and Niacinamide.
peptides.sensitivity_notes: Very well tolerated. Suitable for reactive skin.

exosomes_pdrn.name: Exosome-style Complex & PDRN / Marine DNA
exosomes_pdrn.benefit: Repair-focused actives that support the look of recovery, calmer redness, and a smooth, glass-skin finish
exosomes_pdrn.usage_notes: Morning and evening. Featured in our Exosome PDRN Repair Serum.
exosomes_pdrn.layering_notes: Gentle and layer-friendly under heavier serums or cream.
exosomes_pdrn.sensitivity_notes: Very well tolerated, suitable for sensitive and recovering skin.

tranexamic_acid.name: Tranexamic Acid
tranexamic_acid.benefit: Supports a more even-looking tone and helps soften the appearance of dark marks and discolouration
tranexamic_acid.usage_notes: Morning and evening. Featured in our Glow + Marks Serum alongside stable Vitamin C and Alpha Arbutin.
tranexamic_acid.layering_notes: Pairs well with Niacinamide, Alpha Arbutin, and HA.
tranexamic_acid.sensitivity_notes: Gentle and well tolerated by most skin types.

caffeine.name: Caffeine
caffeine.benefit: Helps refresh a puffy, tired-looking appearance, especially around the eyes
caffeine.usage_notes: Morning and evening. Featured in our Neuro Peptide Eye & Smile Line Serum.
caffeine.layering_notes: Layers well with peptides, Niacinamide, and HA.
caffeine.sensitivity_notes: Very gentle, suitable for the delicate eye area.
